title: AI Behavior & Blackboard
description: Understand AIControllers, Behavior Trees, Blackboards, Behavior Tree Tasks, and NavMesh navigation in Unreal.
learningObjectives: Differentiate AIControllers from possessed Character Pawns
Define AI states and target keys using Blackboard structures
Create custom Behavior Tree Tasks in C++ to direct AI movements

sections.title: Behavior Trees and Blackboards
sections.content:
Unreal Engine AI consists of:

1. **AIController**: The controller possessing the AI pawn. Runs execution ticks.
2. **Blackboard**: Memory storage containing keys (variables like `TargetActor` or `SelfLocation`).
3. **Behavior Tree**: Execution flowchart directing AI behavior based on blackboard keys (e.g. sequence: check target → move to target → attack target).

sections.title: Custom Behavior Tree Task in C++
